name: Teck Resources Limited
description: Teck Resources Limited is a leading Canadian diversified mining company primarily focused on copper and zinc, with major operations including Highland Valley Copper in British Columbia, Quebrada Blanca in Chile, Antamina (copper-zinc) in Peru, and Red Dog (one of the world's largest zinc mines) in Alaska. Following the divestiture of its steelmaking coal business, Teck is executing a strategy to double copper production by 2030 through expansion projects at Quebrada Blanca and Highland Valley. In September 2025, Teck and Anglo American announced a merger of equals to form Anglo Teck, which would create a top-five global copper producer headquartered in Canada.
